metadata.scope: Official tokens only — entries require a Scryfall oracle_id, meaning WotC has printed a physical token card for them. Tokens created by card text that have no official printed token card (e.g. Monkey, Banana, Zeppelin) are tracked separately as 'unofficial_tokens' on the individual deck JSON files.
